site.name: AITrans.Video
site.defaultTitle: AITrans.Video · Make the world's videos speak Chinese
site.defaultDescription: Turn long English videos into publish-ready Chinese-dubbed versions. AI video translation, Chinese voiceover, AI subtitles, YouTube video translation, SRT subtitle export, and a long-form localization workbench. Supports videos up to 3 hours, with sentence-by-sentence editing and single-sentence regeneration.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: AI translation and dubbing pricing for long-video creators. Pick a plan that fits the processing power and workbench mode you need — import, translate, dub, review line by line, and export in multiple formats, all in one place.

trial.title: Free trial
trial.description: Experience AITrans.Video's full video translation and dubbing workflow for free: import, translate, dub, review line by line, and export — sign up to start.
